briefdescription.para: Individual channel chopping frequency divisor options.
Hit current not reached error fault.
Voltage drive with current limiter mode.
Set the master chopping frequency for the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Set master chop frequency to 50kHz

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The desired master chopping frequency to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the master chop frequency of the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

simplesect.para: The master chop frequency in Hz on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the channel frequency of the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to read.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Set the part state (enable/disable) of the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
True to enable the part, false to disable.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, bool enable)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_channel_state

briefdescription.para: Set the channel state (enable/disable) of a channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the state for.
True to enable the channel, false to disable.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Mask detection of a fault condition on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Mask fault pin for overcurrent condition

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The fault condition to mask.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Unmask detection of a fault condition on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Unmask fault pin for overcurrent condition

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The fault condition to unmask.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Set the VDR mode of the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Set VDR mode to VDRDUTY

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The VDR mode to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the VDR mode of the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

simplesect.para: The VDR mode on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the status of the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Pointer to the variable to store the status.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the voltage monitor of the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: VM Measurement is calculated as:
VM = KVM x vm_monitor where KVM = 9.73 mV

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Pointer to the variable to store the voltage monitor.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Set the demagnetization voltage of the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: If mode is MAX2221X_VDR_MODE_DUTY, dc_hdl represents a voltage. The voltage value is calculated as VOUT (V) = KVDR x 36 x dc_hdl. If mode is MAX2221X_VDR_MODE_NORMAL, dc_hdl represents a duty cycle. The voltage value is calculated as VOUT (V) = KVDR x VM x dc_hdl. Here, KVDR = 30.518 uV.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The desired demagnetization voltage to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the demagnetization voltage of the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Pointer to the variable to store the demagnetization voltage.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Set the upper threshold of the supply voltage monitor of the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Set upper threshold to 4500 mV

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The desired upper threshold to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the upper threshold of the supply voltage monitor of the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

simplesect.para: The upper threshold in millivolts on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Set the lower threshold of the supply voltage monitor of the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Set lower threshold to 4500 mV

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The desired lower threshold to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the lower threshold of the supply voltage monitor of the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

simplesect.para: The lower threshold in millivolts on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the DC_L2H value of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Pointer to the variable to store the DC_L2H value.
The channel to read the DC_L2H value from.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t dc_l2h, uint8_t channel)
memberdef.name: max2221x_write_dc_l2h

briefdescription.para: Write the DC_L2H value of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the DC_L2H level: VDR: VOUT (V) = KVDR x 36 x dc_l2h VDRDUTY: VOUT (V) = KVDR x VM x dc_l2h CDR: IOUT (mA) = KCDR x GAIN x SNSF x dc_l2h where KVDR = 30.518 uV, KCDR = 1.017 mA (MAX22216) or 0.339 mA (MAX22217).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The desired DC_L2H value to write.
The channel to write the DC_L2H value to.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the DC_H value of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Pointer to the variable to store the DC_H value.
The channel to read the DC_H value from.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t dc_h, uint8_t channel)
memberdef.name: max2221x_write_dc_h

briefdescription.para: Write the DC_H value of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the DC_H level: VDR: VOUT (V) = KVDR x 36 x dc_h VDRDUTY: VOUT (V) = KVDR x VM x dc_h CDR: IOUT (mA) = KCDR x GAIN x SNSF x dc_h where KVDR = 30.518 uV, KCDR = 1.017 mA (MAX22216) or 0.339 mA (MAX22217).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The desired DC_H value to write.
The channel to write the DC_H value to.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the DC_L value of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Pointer to the variable to store the DC_L value.
The channel to read the DC_L value from.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t dc_l, uint8_t channel)
memberdef.name: max2221x_write_dc_l

briefdescription.para: Write the DC_L value of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the DC_L level: VDR: VOUT (V) = KVDR x 36 x dc_l VDRDUTY: VOUT (V) = KVDR x VM x dc_l CDR: IOUT (mA) = KCDR x GAIN x SNSF x dc_l where KVDR = 30.518 uV, KCDR = 1.017 mA (MAX22216) or 0.339 mA (MAX22217).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The desired DC_L value to write.
The channel to write the DC_L value to.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the time L2H value of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Pointer to the variable to store the time L2H value.
The channel to read the time L2H value from.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t time_l2h, uint8_t channel)
memberdef.name: max2221x_write_time_l2h

briefdescription.para: Write the time L2H value of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the time L2H level: TIME_L2H (s) = time_l2h / channel chopping frequency

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The desired time L2H value to write.
The channel to write the time L2H value to.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum max2221x_ctrl_mode mode, uint8_t channel)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_ctrl_mode

briefdescription.para: Set the control mode of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Set control mode for DC motor drive for channel 1

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The desired control mode to set.
The channel to set the control mode for.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the control mode of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to get the control mode for.

simplesect.para: The control mode on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, uint8_t ramp_mask, bool enable)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_ramps

briefdescription.para: Set ramps on channel of the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: This is the base function that enables or disables ramps based on the enable parameter. Use max2221x_enable_ramps() or max2221x_disable_ramps() for specific enable/disable operations.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the ramps for.
The ramp mask indicating which ramps to modify.
True to enable the specified ramps, false to disable.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, uint8_t ramp_slew_rate)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_ramp_slew_rate

briefdescription.para: Set the ramp slew rate of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the Ramp Slew Rate. VDRDUTY: Ramp Slew Rate (V/ms) = KVDR x VM x (ramp_slew_rate + 1) x F_PWM (kHz) VDR: Ramp Slew Rate (V/ms) = KVDR x 36 x (ramp_slew_rate + 1) x F_PWM (kHz) CDR: Ramp Slew Rate (mA/ms) = KCDR x GAIN x SNSF x (ramp_slew_rate + 1) x F_PWM (kHz)
where KVDR = 30.518 uV, KCDR = 1.017 mA (MAX22216) or 0.339 mA (MAX22217), F_PWM is the channel chopping frequency.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the ramp slew rate for.
The desired ramp slew rate to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the ramp slew rate of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to get the ramp slew rate for.

simplesect.para: The ramp slew rate on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, enum max2221x_ch_freq_div freq_div)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_channel_chop_freq_div

briefdescription.para: Set the chopping frequency divider of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Set channel chopping frequency divider to 1

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the chopping frequency divider for.
The desired chopping frequency divider to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the chopping frequency divider of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to get the chopping frequency divider for.

simplesect.para: The chopping frequency divider on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, enum max2221x_slew_rate slew_rate)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_slew_rate

briefdescription.para: Set the slew rate of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Set slew rate to 400V/us for channel 1

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the slew rate for.
The desired slew rate to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the slew rate of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to get the slew rate for.

simplesect.para: The slew rate on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, enum max2221x_gain gain)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_gain

briefdescription.para: Set the digital gain for the CDR of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Set gain to 1 for channel 1

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the gain for.
The desired gain to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the digital gain for the CDR of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to get the gain for.

simplesect.para: The gain on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, enum max2221x_snsf snsf)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_snsf

briefdescription.para: Set the sense scaling factor of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Set sense scaling factor 2/3 for channel 1

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the sense scaling factor for.
The desired sense scaling factor to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the sense scaling factor of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to get the sense scaling factor for.

simplesect.para: The sense scaling factor on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the PWM duty cycle of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to read the PWM duty cycle from.
Pointer to the variable to store the PWM duty cycle.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the fault status from FAULT0 register of the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the fault status from FAULT1 register of the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, uint16_t on_time_us)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_on_time

briefdescription.para: Set the on time of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the on time for.
The desired on time to set in microseconds.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the on time of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to get the on time for.

simplesect.para: The on time in microseconds on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, uint16_t off_time_us)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_off_time

briefdescription.para: Set the off time of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the off time for.
The desired off time to set in microseconds.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the off time of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to get the off time for.

simplesect.para: The off time in microseconds on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, bool stop_state)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_stop_state

briefdescription.para: Set the stop state of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the stop state for.
The desired stop state to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the stop state of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to get the stop state for.

simplesect.para: The stop state on success, or a negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, uint16_t repetitions)
memberdef.name: max2221x_set_repetitions

briefdescription.para: Set the repetitions of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to set the repetitions for.
The desired repetitions to set.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the repetitions of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to get the repetitions for.

simplesect.para: The repetitions on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Start the rapid fire mode of channel on the MAX2221X device.

detaileddescription.para: Set rapid fire parameters and start rapid fire mode. The example below demonstrates how to configure the on time (1000 us), off time (1000 us), stop state (true), and repetitions (10) before starting the rapid fire mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to start the rapid fire mode for.
on success.
Negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Stop the rapid fire mode of channel on the MAX2221X device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
The channel to stop the rapid fire mode for.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.
